blocks.text: Match preview: Nigeria Women face Brazil Women in 2nd Match (T20) on Thu, 11 Jun, 2026, 1:00 pm at Gahanga International Cricket Stadium Kigali City. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Gahanga International Cricket Stadium Kigali City

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 26°C / Low 16°C · Rain: 0.9 mm · Wind: up to 9 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
